data.title: Swift reportedly picks Linea for multi-month interbank messaging system transition
data.description:
Swift has chosen Consensys-developed Linea to pilot its transition from traditional interbank messaging to blockchain-based communications, according to a Sept. 26 report by The Big Whale.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/swift-reportedly-picks-linea-for-multi-month-interbank-messaging-system-transition/

data.title: Ethereum Stuck Below $4,060: A Fakeout Or Fresh Leg Down To $3,600?
data.description:
Ethereum finds itself at a crossroads after tapping the $3,800 liquidity level and bouncing back, only to stall below the key $4,060 region. With momentum hanging in the balance, traders are questioning whether this pause is simply a fakeout before a recovery or the start of a deeper move toward the $3,600 support level. Struggling Below $4,060: Key Support Yet To Be Reclaimed Ted, a well-followed crypto analyst, recently shared his insights on Ethereum’s latest price action in a post on X. According to the expert, ETH successfully tapped into the $3,800 liquidity level, a move he had anticipated
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-stuck-below-4060/

data.title: SoftBank and Ark consider backing Tether in funding round: report
data.description:
Tether seeks $15–20B funding at $500B valuation with SoftBank and Ark in talks. A $500B valuation could make Tether one of the world’s largest private firms. SoftBank and Ark backing may boost Tether’s push for mainstream legitimacy
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/softbank-and-ark-consider-backing-tether-in-funding-round-report/

data.title: Crypto market loses $300 billion as Ether plunges 12%, Bitcoin hits March lows
data.description:
The crypto market got slammed with a brutal $300 billion loss this week as leverage-heavy trades across the board unraveled, tanking major coins and dragging overall sentiment to levels not seen since June. The crash started snowballing after Ether dropped a steep 12%, its worst weekly drop since the middle of the year. That fall […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-market-loses-300-billion/

data.title: AI Won’t ‘Kill’ Bitcoin Mining – It Might Reprice It
data.description:
Since the latest Bitcoin halving cut block rewards in half, compressing revenues across the mining sector, large operators have been searching for ways to stabilize income streams. Increasingly, they are leasing their energy footprints to artificial intelligence and high-performance computing clients. The model is not speculative; it is already being written into multiyear contracts. In September, […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ai-wont-kill-bitcoin-mining-it-might-reprice-it/

data.title: U.S. Core PCE Hits 2.9% in August, Matches Expectations – Does This Clear the Path for Bitcoin?
data.description:
The U. S. Core PCE Price Index, the Federal Reserve's preferred inflation gauge, came in at 2. 9% year-over-year for August 2025 matching market forecasts while the broader PCE climbed 2. 7% year-over-year.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/u-s-core-pce-hits-2-9-in-august-matches-expectations-does-this-clear-path-for-bitcoin/

data.title: Chinese stocks surge as foreign and local investors pile in
data.description:
Chinese stocks are blowing up, and the buying isn’t slowing. Both foreign funds and local investors are throwing cash into the market. The Shanghai Composite just hit its highest point in ten years, and the Hang Seng Index in Hong Kong has already climbed 30% in 2025. That makes it the best run since 2017. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/chinese-stocks-surge/
